text: CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION MILESTONES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an app that tracks child development milestones and provides guidance for early action if concerns arise. 1600 Clifton Road Atlanta, GA 30329 Eligibility: Birth to age 5 Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Internet Information Resources * Developmental Issues Internet Information Resources * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - NATURAL DISASTERS AND SEVERE WEATHER HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - COVID-19 NO COST TESTING INFORMATION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - FLU AND COVID-19 VACCINE FINDER HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - GET PREP PUBLIC HEALTH - CDC NATIONAL PREVENTION INFORMATION NETWORK SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TRAVELERS' HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
